name: XDBot Rework
description: A rework of xdBot for GD 2.2081 — frame-accurate macro recorder/replayer, TPS bypass, clickbot, noclip and more.

show-overlay.name: Show Overlay
show-overlay.description: Display bot state, frame count and macro name during play.

frame-label.name: Frame Label
frame-label.description: Show current frame number on screen while in a level.

noclip.name: Noclip
noclip.description: Pass through all objects without dying.

noclip-opacity.name: Noclip Player Opacity
noclip-opacity.description: Player opacity while noclip is active and player would have died.

auto-respawn.name: Auto Respawn
auto-respawn.description: Automatically restart the level after dying.

auto-respawn-delay.name: Respawn Delay (seconds)
auto-respawn-delay.description: Seconds to wait before auto-respawning after death.

tps-bypass.name: TPS Bypass
tps-bypass.description: Override the physics tick rate for higher/lower accuracy.

tps-value.name: TPS Value
tps-value.description: Physics ticks per second when TPS bypass is enabled. Default is 240.

speedhack-audio.name: Speedhack Audio Pitch
speedhack-audio.description: Adjust audio pitch to match speedhack speed.

clickbot.name: Clickbot
clickbot.description: Play sounds on button press and release.

clickbot-playing-only.name: Clickbot Only While Playing
clickbot-playing-only.description: Only play click sounds during macro playback, not during recording.

frame-stepper.name: Frame Stepper
frame-stepper.description: Hold physics after each step. Press N to advance one frame.

auto-stop-playing.name: Auto Stop Playing
auto-stop-playing.description: Automatically stop playback when the macro ends.

disable-speedhack-on-exit.name: Disable Speedhack On Exit
disable-speedhack-on-exit.description: Automatically disable speedhack when exiting a level.
